use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms, modals, and application interfaces
Navigation buttons with multiple visual weight variants (outline, secondary, ghost)
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbars and action bars
Destructive action buttons with distinct warning styling
Accessible button composition using Radix UI Slot pattern
ai_summary: A reusable React button component with multiple style variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for flexible composition and class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management. Includes accessibility features like focus-visible rings, disabled states, and asChild pattern support for polymorphic rendering.
